creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
Updated playd.sh to v1.5.0
In this version I fixed many typos in man page and playd itself.
Also I fixed few bugs.
But best of all I finally encountered, located and fixed very old bug
that prevented playing files/directories with spaces

port patch from v1.3.8 to V1.5.0
http://pastebin.com/9D2hB2VT

Please use this patch to update port
-- 
BSDroot.lv --> coming soon
